image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Your attention is a limited battery.
Context visual: Just like your phone, your brain has a finite amount of focus.
Escalation visual: This concept is called selective attention. It’s how you prioritize information.
Evidence visual: Cognitive load affects how much you can focus. More distractions? More mental drain.
Payoff visual: So, if you feel drained, it’s not your fault. You’re just managing your brain’s battery.
Cta visual: Want to save your brain's battery? Follow for more tips!
